data.title: Veji announces debt settlement
data.description:
• Veji Holdings (OTCPK:VEJIF) entered into debt settlement agreements to settle outstanding debts totaling $128,375 owned to certain non-arm’s length creditors and arm’s length creditors for management fees, consulting fees and loans made to the company.
  • The company has agreed to issue an aggregate of 389,013 common shares at a deemed price of $0.33 per share to the creditors.

data.title: U.S. stocks open mixed after key inflation reading comes in-line with estimates
data.description:
U.S. stocks opened mixed on Friday, with market participants receiving a key inflation reading that came in-line with expectations.

Minutes after the opening bell, the benchmark S&P 500 (SP500) was -0.3%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite (COMP:IND) was -0.7%. The blue-chip Dow (DJI) was little changed.

U.S. Treasury yields were lower. The 10-year yield (US10Y) was down 1 basis point to 4.25%, while the 2-year yield (US2Y) was down 3 basis points to 4.04%.

Before the open, the January Core PCE Price Index came in at +0.3% M/M vs. +0.3% expected and +0.2% prior, and +2.6% Y/Y vs. +2.6% consensus and +2.9% (revised from +2.8%).

PCE Price Index, which includes food and energy prices, was +0.3% M/M vs. +0.4% consensus and +0.3% prior, and +2.5% Y/Y vs. +2.5% consensus and +2.6% prior.

Wall Street caught a bout of heavy selling in the final hour of trading on Thursday, as sentiment took a hit from a post-earnings fall in semiconductor giant Nvidia (NVDA) and more tariff-related moves by U.S. President Donald Trump.

"Markets were in a stressed mood of their own yesterday, with renewed tariff threats from Trump in addition to a sharp tech sell-off that saw the Magnificent 7 post its worst day of 2025," Deutsche Bank's Jim Reid said.

"Equity markets reacted to social media posts from US President Trump. Trump is often more coherent on social media than in off-the-cuff comments, and these remarks made clear an intention to hike taxes—US buyers will need 25% more cash to buy Canada or Mexico, and another 10% cash to buy from China," UBS' Paul Donovan said.

On top of the tariffs, we got some more inflationary news from the latest Q4 GDP data, as the Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation measure of PCE was revised up on the second estimate, Reid added.

Wholesale inventories rose in January.

The February Chicago PMI is expected to come in at 40.5.

data.title: Siemens Energy to supply Rolls-Royce with equipment for small modular reactors
data.description:
Siemens Energy (OTCPK:SMEGF) said Friday it entered a partnership it expects will lead to becoming the exclusive supplier of conventional technology for future small modular nuclear reactors planned by Rolls-Royce (OTCPK:RYCEY) (OTCPK:RYCEF).

Siemens Energy (OTCPK:SMEGF) said it will be the sole supplier of steam turbines, generators, and other auxiliary systems for Rolls-Royce's (OTCPK:RYCEY) (OTCPK:RYCEF) planned Generation 3+ modular nuclear power plants, with the final contract detailing all specifics expected to be completed by year-end 2025.

Rolls-Royce SMR (OTCPK:RYCEY) (OTCPK:RYCEF) is developing a "mini nuclear power plant" that can be operational much faster than traditionally built plants, thanks to its standardized, modular design, and its pressurized water reactors are designed to achieve an electrical output of up to 470 MW, enough to supply electricity to ~1.1M households.

Rolls-Royce SMR - which is majority owned by Rolls-Royce (OTCPK:RYCEY) (OTCPK:RYCEF) while Qatar, Constellation Energy (CEG), and BNF Resources hold minority stakes - is one of the companies shortlisted by the U.K. to develop SMRs.

Separately, analysts at Deutsche Bank reiterated their Buy rating on Rolls-Royce (OTCPK:RYCEY) (OTCPK:RYCEF) after reporting strong 2024 results, with revenues rising 17% to £17.8B, and issuing better than expected medium-term guidance.

data.title: Bitdeer announces new $20M share repurchase program
data.description:
• Bitdeer Technologies (NASDAQ:BTDR) said on Friday that it has conducted share repurchase for a total amount of approximately $9M, fully utilizing its $10M share repurchase program approved in September 2024.
  • The board of directors of the company has approved a new share repurchase program to repurchase up to an additional $20M worth of its Class A ordinary shares, effective from February 28, 2025, through February 28, 2026.
  • The company plans to fund repurchases from its existing cash balance. By gradually executing the share repurchase program, Bitdeer seeks to minimize the impact on its share price and generate greater long-term returns for its shareholders.
  • Bitdeer Technologies (BTDR) shares opened 3.3% lower on Friday.

data.title: American Financial declares $2.00 special dividend
data.description:
• American Financial (NYSE:AFG) declares $2.00/share special dividend.
  • Payable March 28; for shareholders of record March 17; ex-div March 17.
  • See AFG Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: FuboTV stock slumps after forecast fails to impress, posts mixed Q4
data.description:
Shares of FuboTV (NYSE:FUBO) were down nearly 14% in Friday's premarket session after the TV streaming platform forecast below Wall Street expectations for the current quarter and reported a mixed fourth quarter.

The company expects Q1 revenue in North America to be $400M to $410M ($405M midpoint) and from the rest of the world to be $7.5M to $8.5M ($8M midpoint). When combining both segments, total revenue is forecast to be between $407.5M and $418.5M ($413M midpoint) according to Seeking Alpha's calculations, which is below the consensus estimate of $436.9M.

Fubo also expects to have 1.430M to 1.460M total subscribers in North America and 330,000 to 340,000 subscribers in ROW.

In Q4, the company saw a 4% subscriber growth in North America at 1.676M, while average revenue per user was $87.90. For ROW, paid subscribers declined nearly 11% to 362,000 and ARPU was $8.50. The consensus estimates for ARPU are $87.90 and $8.90, respectively.

Net loss from continuing operations for the three months ended December 31 narrowed to $40.9M, or a loss per share of $0.11, compared to a loss of $84.4M, or a $0.24 loss per share, in the same period last year.

On an adjusted basis, the company lost 2 cents, while analysts were expecting it to lose 11 cents apiece.

Revenue rose 7.8% to $431.8M and missed the consensus estimate of $445.2M.

data.title: NextTrip converts $2.6M in short-term debt to restricted equity
data.description:
• NextTrip (NASDAQ:NTRP) announced on Friday the conversion of $2.6M in short-term debt, including $1.5M previously advanced by the company's Chairman and CEO.
  • These loans were converted into restricted equity ahead of completion of the company's fiscal year-ended February 28, 2025.
  • Additionally, certain other creditors agreed to convert their $1.1 million of debt into restricted equity. This is in addition to the $1.75 million in short-term promissory notes previously converted to restricted equity on December 31, 2024.
  • These strategic moves eliminate most of the debt from NextTrip's balance sheet, replacing cash repayment obligations, including for accrued principal and interest, with the issuance of restricted shares of the company's stock.
  • This significantly enhances the company's balance sheet and frees up capital to drive key initiatives.

data.title: MacKenzie Realty Capital announces ~$4.8M registered direct offering
data.description:
• Commercial and residential assets-focused REIT MacKenzie Realty Capital (NASDAQ:MKZR) announced on Friday an ~$4.8M registered direct offering and a concurrent private placement.
  • The company entered into a securities purchase agreement with a single institutional investor for the purchase and sale of 2.83M shares of common stock.
  • Concurrently, MacKenzie also agreed to issue unregistered Series A common warrants to purchase up to 1.41M shares and Series B common warrants to purchase up to 2.83M shares.
  • The combined effective offering price for each share and accompanying warrant is $1.71.
  • The offering is expected to close on or about March 3.
  • The net proceeds are intended to be used for capital expenditures, including acquisitions of additional properties, strategic principal payments on outstanding loans, payment of operating expenses, fees and other costs, funding for their preferred stock share repurchase program, other sales and marketing activities and working capital and general corporate purposes.

data.title: CAVA Group is recommended at Piper Sandler after recent stumble
data.description:
Piper Sandler upgraded CAVA Group (NYSE:CAVA) to an Overweight rating on Friday after having the restaurant stock slotted at Neutral.

Analyst Brian Mullan and his team see CAVA (NYSE:CAVA) as one of the best ways to invest in the secular growth of fast casual, especially amid an environment that is choppy and with CAVA shares down 20% year-to-date.

"We think that CAVA is one of the best positioned companies in our coverage to navigate anyenvironment. Specifically, we note that CAVA has taken only ~15% menu pricing versus2019 (as compared to FAFH at ~30%, and more at certain restaurant peers); and whilethis is likely not the only reason for CAVA's traffic outperformance, it has almost certainlyhelped."

For Q4, CAVA Group (CAVA) reported revenue increased 28.3% to $225.1 million. The increase was driven by 77 net new CAVA restaurant openings during the quarter and same-restaurant sales growth of 21.2%, including traffic growth of 15.6%. CAVA's restaurant-level profit margin improved 50 basis points from a year ago to 22.4% of sales.

Shares of CAVA Group (CAVA) were up 1.1% in early trading on Friday.

data.title: Armlogi announces increase in its small parcel shipping volume following Temu marketplace integration
data.description:
• Armlogi (NASDAQ:BTOC) announced that small parcel shipping increased from 128,744 parcels in November 2024 to 167,298 in December 2024, representing 30% growth over such period.
  • In January 2025, volumes reached 194,304 parcels, marking a further 16% increase.
  • Armlogi now serves over 200 Temu customers, a 29% increase from the 155 customers reported in October 2024.
  • Source: Press release
